mapper.select:
SELECT ID, INVOICE_ID, NUM, RED_LETTER_INFO_FORM_NUM, APPLICATION_FORM_CODE, STATUS_DESCRIPTION, STATUS_CODE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_SD_RED_INVOICE_APPLY
id = #{id}

SELECT tfi.* FROM T_FD_INVOICE tfi LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL tfid ON TFI.ID = TFID.INVOICE_ID LEFT JOIN T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL_DETAIL tfcdbd ON tfid.id = tfcdbd.INVOICE_DETAIL_ID
tfcdbd.CNDN_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_SD_RED_INVOICE_APPLY(ID, INVOICE_ID, NUM, RED_LETTER_INFO_FORM_NUM, APPLICATION_FORM_CODE, STATUS_DESCRIPTION, STATUS_CODE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{num, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{redLetterInfoFormNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationFormCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statusDescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_SD_RED_INVOICE_APPLY SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_ID = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NUM = #{num,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RED_LETTER_INFO_FORM_NUM = #{redLetterInfoFormNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLICATION_FORM_CODE = #{applicationFormCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS_DESCRIPTION = #{statusDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS_CODE = #{statusCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
